name: Fidelity Digital Dollar
description: FIDD is a stablecoin pegged 1:1 to the U.S. dollar and is issued by Fidelity Digital Assets, National Association, a subsidiary of Fidelity Investments®. FIDD is backed by the stringent operational standards of Fidelity Digital Assets® and draws on the history, principles, and expertise of the traditional Fidelity Investments® business.
